s-1.ptxt: REMOVE OUTER REAR VIEW MIRROR GLASS (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Push the upper part of the mirror surface and tilt it.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 claws at the lower part of the outer rear view mirror, and remove the outer rear view mirror glass.

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the connector and remove the outer rear view mirror glass.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE OUTER REAR VIEW MIRROR GLASS (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Push the lower part of the mirror surface and tilt it.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 claws at the upper part of the outer rear view mirror, and remove the outer rear view mirror glass.

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the connector and remove the outer rear view mirror glass.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL OUTER REAR VIEW MIRROR GLASS (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws on the upper part of the outer rear view mirror glass to the outer rear view mirror.
Engage the 2 claws on the lower part of the outer rear view mirror glass to the outer rear view mirror as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL OUTER REAR VIEW MIRROR GLASS (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws on the lower part of the outer rear view mirror glass to the outer rear view mirror.
Engage the 2 claws on the upper part of the outer rear view mirror glass to the outer rear view mirror as shown in the illustration.
